Calendar.hero_description: Clusterix's integrated calendar app helps you stay on top of your schedule. Organize events, manage categories, and invite participants with ease. Set up varied appointment types and stay connected with our email integration for a streamlined work experience.
Calendar.box1_title: Introducing Clusterix Calendar: Your Scheduling Powerhouse
Calendar.box1_description: Explore the full potential of scheduling with Clusterix Calendar. Our application brings you all the familiar features of cloud storage and desktop systems, enhanced with deep integration across our suite of apps. Manage your time more effectively with a powerful tool designed to align with your workflow.
Calendar.box2_title: Stay Organized on the Move with the Clusterix Calendar App
Calendar.box2_description: Access your schedule anytime, anywhere with our mobile calendar app. Keep tabs on your upcoming events and never miss a beat.
Calendar.box3_description: Manage your invitations directly from your email. Create calendar events and respond to invites without switching apps, making sure you're always in sync.
Calendar.box4_description: Coordinate your events with precision in Clusterix Calendar. Link expenses to events for automatic invoicing and data capture — just one of the many integrations designed to enhance your planning process.
Calendar.box2_alternative1_description: Access all the calendar functions you rely on. Create categories, set events, and filter your agenda on our mobile app with the same ease and capability as the desktop version.
Calendar.box2_alternative2_title: Fluid Interface for All Your Devices
Calendar.box2_alternative2_description: Our intuitive design ensures a smooth transition from desktop to mobile, keeping your scheduling consistent wherever you go.
Calendar.box3_alternative1_description: Experience the convenience of managing invitations directly through your email. Our calendar's integration simplifies how you accept or decline invites, ensuring you never miss an important event.
Calendar.box3_alternative2_title: Your Schedule and Communications, Unified on Mobile
Calendar.box3_alternative2_description: Access your calendar and emails in one unified mobile application. Stay connected and manage your time directly from your phone, where your schedule meets your communication.
Calendar.box4_alternative1_description: Easily assign names, time zones, and participants to your events. Share meeting links, associate events with categories, and set reminders all within the app for a streamlined scheduling process.
Calendar.box4_alternative2_description: Set up different types of appointments for recurring events with adjustable settings. Share your available time slots directly with contacts for convenient booking.
Calendar.box4_alternative3_description: Quickly send out event reminders and personal invitations. Assign participants to events and communicate updates effortlessly through the app.
Calendar.modal1_panel1_description: Choose how you view your schedule with options for daily, bi-daily, weekly, monthly, or annual overviews. Stay on top of your events and meetings with a view that suits your planning style.
Calendar.modal1_panel2_title: Efficient Slot Scheduling for Your Appointments
Calendar.modal1_panel2_description: Set up repeating appointments quickly using our slots feature. Easily toggle appointment types on or off, make edits, and share scheduling links with a single click.
Calendar.modal1_panel3_description: Our calendar app is built with inclusivity in mind. Navigate swiftly using keyboard shortcuts and enjoy a user-friendly experience that caters to all our clients’ needs.

DocumentManagement.hero_description: Clusterix provides a unified document management platform where all your files are consolidated in one secure location. Say goodbye to data silos and scattered documents. Our app's deep integration with other tools simplifies file categorization, storage, and sharing, enhancing collaboration and efficiency.
DocumentManagement.content_header_text2: knowing all your documents are in one place
DocumentManagement.box1_title: Secure Cloud Storage for Your Business Documents
DocumentManagement.box1_description: Store, manage, and access all your business files in one secure cloud-based platform. Our Document Management app not only simplifies file organization but also integrates deeply with your other business applications for a comprehensive document ecosystem.
DocumentManagement.box2_description: Clusterix Document Management centralizes your file storage, providing a single point of access for all documents. Organize, share, and manage files across your team with ease, ensuring data is always at your fingertips.
DocumentManagement.box3_description: Protect your sensitive information with Clusterix's advanced security protocols, including multi-factor authentication and end-to-end encryption.
DocumentManagement.box4_description: Our suite of applications operates in harmony, offering a comprehensive and integrated document management experience. Adding expenses, for instance, automatically links to the relevant invoice, extracting and syncing data without the need for manual entry. This interconnected approach powers countless workflows, simplifying complex processes.
DocumentManagement.box2_alternative1_description: Say goodbye to scattered files across individual devices. Our platform consolidates all your data into one accessible location, complete with clear user permissions for easy management.
DocumentManagement.box2_alternative2_description: Experience a cohesive file structure tailored to your business functions. Our system standardizes file organization across your entire company, streamlining the search and retrieval process.
DocumentManagement.box2_alternative3_description: Customize your file management experience. Our flexible system allows you to define and adjust how data is organized and accessed, ensuring a perfect fit for your operational needs.
DocumentManagement.box2_alternative4_description: Benefit from a structured file system deeply integrated with our suite of apps, designed for peak operational efficiency and the smoothest workflow experience.
DocumentManagement.box3_alternative1_description: Our commitment to security is proven through regular audits by independent experts, ensuring our compliance with ISO 27001 and GDPR, reflecting our dedication to safeguarding your data.
DocumentManagement.box3_alternative2_description: Your data's security is our top priority. We implement advanced encryption protocols both in transit and at rest to ensure your information remains inaccessible to unauthorized parties.
DocumentManagement.box3_alternative3_description: We fortify our human defenses by providing thorough security training for our team, equipping them to avoid phishing and social engineering attempts effectively.
DocumentManagement.box3_alternative4_description: Clusterix's Authenticator App boosts security, adding an extra layer of protection to user logins. We rigorously apply these security measures across our operations to prevent breaches.
DocumentManagement.modal1_panel1_title: Customize Your View for Optimal Organization
DocumentManagement.modal1_panel1_description: Choose the view that best fits your workflow. Our Document Management Software offers both Tile View for visual simplicity and Table View for detailed information. Switching between views is as simple as a single click, offering you flexibility and control over how you interact with your files.
DocumentManagement.modal1_panel2_title: Empower Your Documents with Dynamic Features
DocumentManagement.modal1_panel2_description: Enhance your document management with advanced features like file previews, tagging, and note-taking. Our platform's smart functionality lets you assign roles for accountability and track the associations between documents and applications, streamlining your document workflows.
DocumentManagement.modal1_panel3_description: Experience a cohesive ecosystem where files are intelligently linked to relevant data within our comprehensive system. Recognizable by design, our platform enables you to easily upload, modify, and manage your documents, fostering a more connected and efficient work environment.
DocumentManagement.modal4_panel1_description: Simplify your financial tracking by managing expenses directly through our accounting app. With integrated uploads, you can quickly categorize expenses, streamlining your financial oversight.<NotYetAvailable>*available early 2024</NotYetAvailable>
DocumentManagement.modal4_panel2_description: Enhance your email efficiency with direct access to all company files for swift sending. The app's interface provides quick access to standard and recent attachments, enabling you to compose and send emails faster.
DocumentManagement.modal4_panel3_description: Our AI enhances your workflow by scanning and auto-filling data in connected apps. This automation paves the way for more optimized and efficient processes.

Email.hero_description: Experience smooth communication and easy inbox management with our user-friendly email app, meticulously crafted to streamline your email experience and boost productivity.
Email.content_header_text2: stay on top of your emails
Email.box1_title: All your emails in one place
Email.box1_description: Stay organized and boost productivity with our intuitive email app. Track all your emails from a single location, ensuring seamless communication and easy inbox management from anywhere, at any time.
Email.box2_description: Easily establish email folders for efficient organization. Prevent emails from getting lost in the clutter. Our Mail app allows you to categorize your emails into folders according to your preferences.
Email.box3_description: Explore seamless integration with our Mail app connected to Calendar App. Easily manage emails and appointments in one place, enhancing productivity and organization.
Email.box4_title: Emails on the go with our Mail Phone App
Email.box4_description: Download and install our email application to ensure uninterrupted connectivity, no matter where you are. Experience the convenience of having your emails  synchronized across all your devices. This means that whether you're on your computer, tablet, or smartphone, you'll have seamless access to your emails, ensuring you stay connected and informed wherever you go.
Email.box5_description: Our suite of applications operates in harmony, offering a comprehensive and integrated document management experience. Adding expenses, for instance, automatically links to the relevant invoice, extracting and syncing data without the need for manual entry. This interconnected approach powers countless workflows, simplifying complex processes.
Email.box2_alternative1_description: Seamless integration with our Calendar App to ensure appointments, meetings or calendar events are never missed.
Email.box2_alternative2_description: At Clusterix, we prioritize security. To guarantee a safe login, we provide two-factor authentication, which can be facilitated using our Clusterix Authenticator App.
Email.box3_alternative1_description: Consolidate all your email accounts in a single application. Monitor and interact with emails seamlessly across different email IDs within one platform.
Email.box3_alternative2_description: Install our email app for constant connectivity while on the move. Your emails are  synchronized across all your devices.
Email.modal1_panel1_description: Elevate your email writing with our web-based mail app, powered by the AI Helper. This intelligent tool refines messages for clarity and professionalism, ensuring effortless and refined communication.
Email.modal1_panel2_description: Craft and send emails swiftly with our intuitive interface. Experience hassle-free communication, allowing you to focus on what truly matters.
Email.modal1_panel3_description: Stay on top of your schedule. Our intuitive interface allows you to easily manage and track appointments, meetings or calendar events, ensuring you never miss an important appointment, meeting or event.
Email.modal4_panel1_title: Manage All Your Mail Accounts from one place
Email.modal4_panel1_description:
With our streamlined interface, you can access, organize, and respond to emails from different sources all in one place. No more switching between platforms or missing important messages – we bring everything together for you. 

Stay organized with our intuitive features, allowing you to categorize and prioritize emails with ease. Simplify your digital life today – try our email app and take control of your inbox like never before
Email.modal4_panel2_title: Compose your emails with AI Helper
Email.modal4_panel2_description: Introducing our AI Helper – a brilliant solution for email creation. This intelligent tool refines messages, ensuring clarity and professionalism. Whether for work or personal use, it streamlines the writing process, transforming thoughts into impactful messages in seconds.
Email.modal4_panel3_title: Integrated Calendar with the Mail App
Email.modal4_panel3_description: Experience the ease of coordinating your inbox and calendar in one place, allowing you to  plan your day, respond to emails, and schedule appointments without the hassle of switching between apps. With our app, you can efficiently manage your emails while keeping track of your upcoming events and deadlines. Stay organized, save time, and boost your productivity by integrating your email correspondence and scheduling needs.

Livechat.hero_description: Streamline your business communications with Livechat. Step into a world where every chat seamlessly combines familiarity with innovation. Live Chat goes beyond mere connection; it's a tool for meaningful business interactions, crafted with intuitive features and easy sharing at its core.
Livechat.box1_description: Discover a new way of talking to people. Enjoy a place where talking feels easy and exciting at the same time. With Live Chat, you don't just talk to others; you make each chat better. Our carefully made design and simple way to share important stuff are all for one reason: to make sure your talks are memorable.
Livechat.box2_description: Dealing with fragmented conversations and missed messages has often been a challenge. Our platform is here to transform the way you manage and archive chats, ensuring that communication is streamlined for optimal collaboration.
Livechat.box3_description: Experience communication without boundaries. Whether on your mobile device or desktop, Live Chat ensures all your chats are synced across your devices - consistent, seamless, and intuitive interactions tailored for every platform and every moment.
Livechat.box4_description: Our suite of applications operates in harmony, offering a comprehensive and integrated document management experience. Adding expenses, for instance, automatically links to the relevant invoice, extracting and syncing data without the need for manual entry. This interconnected approach powers countless workflows, simplifying complex processes.
Livechat.box2_alternative1_description: Streamlining chats is crucial in a business context. With our platform, you can easily manage and archive conversations, ensuring no message goes astray, and every dialogue is easily retrievable.
Livechat.box2_alternative2_description: Missed messages can be a thing of the past. Our system ensures timely notifications for every important chat, so you're always in the loop, and nothing slips through the cracks.
Livechat.box2_alternative3_description: Locating a specific message or file shouldn't feel like searching for a needle in a haystack. With our powerful search capabilities, you can swiftly find what you're looking for, enhancing collaboration and efficiency.
Livechat.box2_alternative4_description: Efficiency in communication often lies in organization. Easily categorize your contacts, create dedicated groups for teams or projects, and ensure every chat finds its rightful place, fostering clearer and more targeted conversations.
Livechat.box3_alternative1_title: MOBILE APP - CHAT ON THE GO
Livechat.box3_alternative1_description: Stay connected wherever you are with our dedicated iOS app. Designed with user experience in mind, it ensures smooth and efficient communication, right from the palm of your hand.
Livechat.box3_alternative2_description: Transform your business communications on a larger scale. Our desktop module offers an expansive view, tailored for optimal collaboration and multitasking.
Livechat.box3_alternative3_title: SEAMLESS SYNC - NEVER MISS A BEAT
Livechat.box3_alternative3_description: Switch between devices without losing the thread of your conversations. Our platform ensures that your chats are synchronized in real-time, providing a consistent experience no matter where you are.
Livechat.box3_alternative4_title: ADAPTIVE INTERFACE - FOR EVERY USE CASE
Livechat.box3_alternative4_description: Whether you're in a meeting, working remotely, or on a business trip, our interface adapts to your needs, ensuring that you always have the best chat experience tailored to your situation.
Livechat.modal1_panel1_description: Conversations aren't just about words. With our rich array of emoji reactions, you can articulate feelings, celebrate moments, and convey sentiments in the most vibrant way imaginable.
Livechat.modal1_panel2_description: Whether it's a document that seals the deal, an image capturing a fleeting moment, or a video that tells a thousand stories - share them all. Effortlessly. Every time.
Livechat.modal1_panel3_title: Message Deletion - Because Perfection Takes Time
Livechat.modal1_panel3_description: We all have moments of reconsideration. Sent a message too soon? Simply retract it. It's your conversation; mold it to perfection.
Livechat.modal1_panel4_description: Every message is a universe of its own. Reply directly, delve deeper into discussions, and ensure that no thought goes unnoticed.
Livechat.modal1_panel5_title: Archive & Unarchive - Conversations at Your Command
Livechat.modal1_panel5_description:
The art of conversation is also in its organization. Archive to declutter. Unarchive to reminisce.
Every chat, every message, exactly where you want it to be.
Livechat.modal1_panel6_description: Bring teams together, create communities, or just gather friends. Our group feature isn't just about collective chatting; it's about building bonds and fostering collaboration.

TaskManagement.hero_description: Experience streamlined productivity with Task Management. Easily organize, track, and complete tasks while viewing tasks, team members, and deadlines in one interface. With timelines, task reports, and customizable charts, see at a glance how effectively your team works and where improvements are needed.
TaskManagement.box1_description: Successfully handling complex projects requires smooth teamwork. Our platform unites teams like never before. Embrace the cutting-edge of task management. Step into a world where collaboration isn't just an extra feature; it's at the core of everything.
TaskManagement.box2_title: Enhance productivity by centralizing projects and discussions
TaskManagement.box2_description: Utilize our collaborative workspaces to consolidate your projects, documents, and conversations. Gain access to all your essentials in a single, unified environment.
TaskManagement.box3_title: Easily monitor tasks with Time Tracking.
TaskManagement.box3_description: In our ever-evolving workspace, simply managing tasks doesn't cut it. Knowing how time is distributed and spent on tasks is key to enhancing productivity and performance. Our platform is  designed to close this gap, providing an optimal balance for managing tasks and tracking time.
TaskManagement.box4_description: Our suite of applications operates in harmony, offering a comprehensive and integrated document management experience. Adding expenses, for instance, automatically links to the relevant invoice, extracting and syncing data without the need for manual entry. This interconnected approach powers countless workflows, simplifying complex processes.
TaskManagement.box2_alternative1_description: Centralize all your projects and discussions within a single platform. Streamline collaboration, eradicate scattered information, and enhance efficiency.
TaskManagement.box2_alternative2_description: Engage in meaningful conversations right next to tasks. Streamline decision-making processes and ensure everyone stays aligned.
TaskManagement.box2_alternative3_description: Easily set milestones and visualize your project’s trajectory. Stay proactive by monitoring progress and addressing potential issues.
TaskManagement.box2_alternative4_description: Integrate with your essential tools to optimize workflows. Bring everything together for a cohesive task management experience.
TaskManagement.box3_alternative1_description: Capture the time spent on each task. With our refined time tracking understand exactly how and where effort is being channeled.
TaskManagement.box3_alternative2_description: Recognize periods of high and low productivity with time metrics. Tailor your workflows according to informed insights to achieve optimal output.
TaskManagement.box3_alternative3_description: Convert tracked hours into invoices effortlessly. Ensure clients are billed accurately, fostering transparency and trust.
TaskManagement.box3_alternative4_description: Monitor team progress and individual contributions. With transparent time logs, promote responsibility and enhance collaboration.
TaskManagement.modal1_panel1_description: Gain a comprehensive understanding of your tasks with our Task Detail Module. It presents all the necessary information at a single glance, ensuring complete oversight. Keep tabs on every detail and manage your tasks with precision.
TaskManagement.modal1_panel2_description: Our Sprint Planner is engineered for peak efficiency. It provides a streamlined overview of your sprints, facilitating prompt and effective planning.
TaskManagement.modal1_panel3_description: Our Task Manager now includes a Cleaning Center to keep your workspace uncluttered and focused. This feature empowers you to quickly pinpoint and discard  redundant tasks and enhance  operational efficiency.

TimeTracking.hero_description: Experience seamless time management with an all-in-one time tracking solution. Elevate productivity by monitoring your tasks, meetings, and projects directly within our intuitive app. Leverage calendar synchronization for a streamlined, automated workflow that aligns with your schedule.
TimeTracking.box1_title: Track Every Minute, Task, and Meeting with Ease
TimeTracking.box1_description: Time Tracking by Clusterix enhances your time management by allowing precise tracking of tasks, meetings, and workflows. Integrate your schedule directly in the app for detailed time recording, ensuring your work hours are captured accurately for every project.
TimeTracking.box2_title: Automate Your Workflows from Calendar to Time-Tracking
TimeTracking.box2_description: Our app automates your time tracking by synchronizing with your calendar. Choose to track all events or just the ones you need, ensuring your schedule is always up-to-date.
TimeTracking.box3_title: Tailor Time Tracking to Fit Your Workflow
TimeTracking.box3_description: Gain the flexibility to customize your time tracking preferences. Decide when to start and stop the timer, and personalize your experience to match your work style.
TimeTracking.box4_title: Connected to task management app for a full picture
TimeTracking.box4_description: Our apps work together seamlessly, and time tracker is no different. That means that when creating a task, this will trigger the time tracker and will connect to the assignment.
TimeTracking.box2_alternative1_description: Adjust the integration settings, auto timer start, auto stop time, create custom activities and legal templates in time tracking.
TimeTracking.box2_alternative2_description: You’ll get attention dialogs when you forget to stop your timer or and event starting to give an option to save it in the time tracking
TimeTracking.box3_alternative1_description: No more files on individual event entries. Sync all your calendar or only the categories you choose and site back and watch the magic happens.
TimeTracking.box3_alternative2_description: You can track your time and manage your task in the mobile app now. You can comment on the tasks, reply comments and see activity log easily.
TimeTracking.box4_alternative_header: Time Tracking and Task Management Integration
TimeTracking.box4_alternative1_description: Your time is stored when you started your timer. Easily check your progress. Stop and restart or slip your time to enter detailed information on your events.
TimeTracking.box4_alternative2_description: We track your time and connect it with task management. You can sync both apps and timer will be updated accordingly.
TimeTracking.box4_alternative3_description: You’ll be the first one to know if there is a new activity about the tasks. You can check the activity, comment on it and reply the comments sent to you.
TimeTracking.modal1_panel1_title: View All Your Events in One Place
TimeTracking.modal1_panel1_description: Our Stacked Events feature consolidates your tasks, meetings, and custom activities into a single, streamlined column. This organization makes it simple to see where your time is allocated throughout the day.
TimeTracking.modal1_panel2_description: Not only can you track time on a daily basis, but our Monthly View also presents a broad perspective. Easily access a rundown of monthly events and dive into a detailed time analysis for any selected employee.
TimeTracking.modal1_panel3_description: Gain valuable insights with our Statistics feature. Quickly filter and review tracked activities by employee, enhancing your ability to oversee productivity and manage time effectively.

ConnectModal.panel1_description: Navigating the modern workspace requires more than just task management; it demands a clear grasp of time distribution for each task. Our platform provides the tools to track time allocation, boosting productivity and enhancing performance.
ConnectModal.panel2_description: Access all company files within the app to quickly attach and send them via email. The app also streamlines the process of including standard and recently used files, enabling you to send emails more quickly.
ConnectModal.panel3_description: In the fast-paced corporate world, efficient file management is essential. Our system consolidates file storage, simplifying file retrieval and sharing and driving efficiency across your organization.

HumanResources.hero_description: Revolutionize your HR processes. Step into an environment where every interaction is an opportunity for growth and efficiency. With our HR App, it's not just about managing — it's a platform for dynamic HR solutions, crafted with intuitive features and designed for effortless integration and engagement.
HumanResources.box1_description: Revolutionize your HR processes through our HR app where every interaction is an opportunity for growth and efficiency. It is not just about managing - it's a platform for dynamic HR solutions crafted with intuitive features and designed for effortless integration and engagement.
HumanResources.box2_description: Simplify the complexities of managing teams, departments and employees with a unified system. Assign team leaders, handle essential documents, and process absence requests with ease.
HumanResources.box3_description: Transform your recruitment process, manage job offers, track candidate progress all while handling applications and candidate CV's efficiently.
HumanResources.box4_description: Our suite of applications operates in harmony, offering a comprehensive and integrated document management experience. Adding expenses, for instance, automatically links to the relevant invoice, extracting and syncing data without the need for manual entry. This interconnected approach powers countless workflows, simplifying complex processes.
HumanResources.box5_description: Improve team communication within your HR operations using Live Chat. Easily form department groups, dispatch vital documents, and handle requests, ensuring your team remains in sync and efficient, regardless of location.
HumanResources.modal1_panel1_description: Our system simplifies the complexity of absence management with precision, tracking and an easy overview. Coordinating off days becomes a hassle free experience allowing HR to focus on people not paperwork.
HumanResources.modal1_panel2_title: Manage Your Candidate Life Cycle Processes
HumanResources.modal1_panel2_description: Our candidate management system is crafted to foster efficiency and ease. Monitor applicant progress, conduct interviews, and build your team using a platform that shares your commitment to candidates.
HumanResources.modal1_panel3_title: Control Everything From The Command Hub
HumanResources.modal1_panel3_description: Take control of your HR operations with ease. Our dashboard provides a panoramic view of all HR activities offering insights and control at your fingertips to make informed decisions swiftly.
HumanResources.modal1_panel4_title: Manage People, Teams and Departments Across Countries
HumanResources.modal1_panel4_description: Our platform offers a unified view of your workforce enabling seamless management of teams and departments across borders fostering collaboration without complications.
HumanResources.modal4_panel1_description: Enjoy the ease of handling payrolls, bonuses, and additional payments within HR using the Accounting Tool. Each transaction seamlessly integrates with your financials, ensuring precise and up-to-date accounts.
HumanResources.modal4_panel2_description: The HR app is a hub for your Document Management System, establishing a secure and efficient channel for vital documents. Contracts, NDAs, and sensitive HR materials seamlessly transfer into your digital repository, providing instant access and robust security.
HumanResources.modal4_panel3_description: The HR app and Live Chat converge to empower your teams with instant messaging and file sharing. This synergy facilitates a dynamic, collaborative space, improving productivity with speed and ease.
HumanResources.modal4_panel4_description: The email integration in the HR app demonstrates seamless communication. Connect with people using a comprehensive, intuitive and powerful email system - ensuring impact for every conversation to move things forward.
HumanResources.modal5_panel1_description: Engage in departmental dialogues with direct group joining. Our Live Chat enables you to participate in real-time conversations, enhancing team collaboration.
HumanResources.modal5_panel2_description: Send crucial documents like NDAs and contracts with the click of a button. Ensure every file reaches its destination securely and without delay.
HumanResources.modal5_panel3_description: Convey your message with the nuance of voice. Our Voice Message feature allows you to send quick audio messages, adding a personal touch to remote communication.
HumanResources.modal5_panel4_title: On-the-Go Accessibility - Chat in Your Pocket
HumanResources.modal5_panel4_description: Stay connected and keep conversations going, even when out of office. Full chat functionality, now in your pocket.
HumanResources.box2_alternative1_description: Build and customize team hierarchies. Assign roles and manage permissions with flexibility.
HumanResources.box2_alternative2_description: Centralize important employee documents securely all in one place - right from contracts to performance reviews.
HumanResources.box2_alternative3_description: Simplify the process of managing absences with an intuitive interface for submitting and approving leave requests.
HumanResources.box2_alternative4_description: View and edit employee profiles, manage their roles, and keep their information up to date with a few clicks.
HumanResources.box3_alternative1_description: Create and publish job offers with detailed descriptions and requirements to help attract the right candidates.
HumanResources.box3_alternative2_description: Easily manage your talent acquisition process - browse through candidate applications, review CVs and update a candidate's application status with ease.
HumanResources.box3_alternative3_description: Stay updated on the status of candidates application statuses throughout the recruitment cycle - from initial application to final decision.
HumanResources.box3_alternative4_description: Utilize powerful search tools to filter candidates based on skills, experience, and more to find the perfect match.

Sales.hero_title: Unlock Your Customer and Company Potential
Sales.hero_description: Software solutions often come with disjointed interfaces and unreliable connections. Clusterix offers a radical approach to unification—one platform to find and manage every contact, company, and lead. The result? An agile organization that adapts swiftly to evolving markets. Become a super organization with Clusterix.
Sales.content_header_text: Connecting your data all across the system
Sales.content_header_text2: Get rid of data silos, inefficient software connections & knowledge fragmentation thanks to the interconnected nature of our apps.
Sales.box1_description: Unlock sales excellence with the Sales App: streamline workflows, access a vast 3 million company database, and leverage analytics for smarter strategies. Close deals faster and boost efficiency, propelling your team to new heights of success.
Sales.box2_description: Maximize collaboration and drive unified team efforts with the Sales App. Our platform is specifically designed to ensure smooth coordination between teams, providing the features needed to align strategies, share insights, and work together more effectively.
Sales.box3_description: With fully customization you can choose how you use time tracking. With this freedom, you can elect when to start, when to stop the time, and so much more.
Sales.box4_description: Boost efficiency with our Sales App's internal live chat, enabling quick team communication and decision-making, directly improving sales operations and teamwork.
Sales.box5_description: Our suite of applications operates in harmony, offering a comprehensive and integrated experience. This interconnected approach powers countless workflows and simplifies complex processes all to ensure that you have everything you need under a single platform.
Sales.modal1_panel1_description: Navigate with ease through our user-friendly interface, designed for optimal efficiency.
Sales.modal1_panel2_description: Dive into a vast database, finding sales prospects or suppliers with precision and confidence.
Sales.modal1_panel3_description: Tailor your sales and procurement processes with flexible, easy-to-adjust workflows.
Sales.modal4_panel1_description: The Sales App pairs effortlessly with the live chat app, fostering real-time communication and collaboration, crucial for accelerating sales processes and enhancing team connectivity.
Sales.modal4_panel2_description: The Sales App integrates smoothly with the email app, enabling direct email communications within the sales workflow, enhancing efficiency and streamlining follow-ups and client interactions.
Sales.modal4_panel3_description: The Sales App works seamlessly alongside the calendar app, facilitating the coordination of sales activities and ensuring efficient scheduling and task management.
Sales.modal5_panel1_description: Dive into departmental discussions effortlessly. With Live Chat, join groups, engage in real-time conversations, and collaborate seamlessly.
Sales.modal5_panel2_description: Send crucial documents like NDAs and contracts with the click of a button. Secure and swift, ensure every file reaches its destination promptly.
Sales.modal5_panel3_description: When text falls short, convey your message with clarity. Send a voice message quickly and maintain the human touch, no matter where you are.
Sales.modal5_panel4_title: On-the-Go Accessibility - Chat in Your Pocket
Sales.modal5_panel4_description: Stay connected and keep conversations going, even when out of office. Full chat functionality, now in your pocket.
Sales.modal5_panel5_description: Keep your communication secure with our commitment to safety. Data is stored in Germany, adhering to GDPR compliance, ensuring your conversations are protected at the highest standard.
Sales.box2_alternative1_description: Update the team on sales progress and achievements for improved transparency and accountability.
Sales.box2_alternative2_description: View deals and evaluations in real-time, aligning the team's focus and objectives.
Sales.box2_alternative3_description: Easily access and manage sales data from one place for informed team decisions.
Sales.box2_alternative4_description: Adapt the sales process to your team's needs for enhanced efficiency and effectiveness.
Sales.box3_alternative1_description: Collect vital data at every sales stage for targeted follow-ups and smarter strategy.
Sales.box3_alternative2_description: Gain insights from analytics to shape strategies with informed, data-driven decisions.
Sales.box3_alternative3_description: Tailor the sales process to meet your business needs for a seamless operational fit.
Sales.box3_alternative4_description: Track campaign performance in real-time for immediate adjustments and better planning.

Main.hero_title: Clusterix makes you a super organization
Main.hero_description: Software in companies today means interfaces that are rarely available and almost never function reliably. Clusterix is a radical approach to unification. One software for everything a company does. The reward is an organization that can finally deliver data and adapt very quickly to a changing market. Become a super organization with Clusterix.
Main.box1_title: Connecting your data all across the system
Main.box1_description: Get rid of data silos, inefficient software connections & knowledge fragmentation thanks to the interconnected nature of our apps. Make a step into the digital future of your company.
Main.box2_description: Having just one system instead of many island solutions means that you have less systems to maintain, less bills to pay and less time to waste on transferring data between apps.
Main.box3_title: A meaningful selection of apps for all your needs
Main.box3_description: We made sure to develop apps that benefit as much as possible of the nature of our system. That way you never need to use another system again while ensuring maximum ease of use.
Main.box4_title: Constantly growing always up to date
Main.box4_description: Clusterix has many great apps in the making like project management, subsidy application and many more. As a webapp it is always up to date and is based on the latest standards.

VideoSection.title: A 360° Solution for Your Search Needs
VideoSection.description: Our Customers and Company Searcher is part of an integrated ecosystem that ties all your data together. Quickly discover leads, suppliers, or potential partners in one unified view—without juggling multiple platforms or messy spreadsheets.

AppMenu.app_hr_desc: Manage your recruitment processes as well as all your employee data. Effortlessly manage contracts, vacation requests, team structures and sick days.
AppMenu.app_time_tracking_desc: Directly tying into task management and project planning, this app allows for consistent and tax law compliant time documentation for all your projects with timesheet generation.
AppMenu.app_document_management_desc: All your files properly sorted in one place, stored securely and shared with the right people within your organization
AppMenu.app_livechat_desc: Directly communicate with anyone in- and outside of your organization with our business oriented live chat app that is available also as a mobile application.
AppMenu.app_calendar_desc: Organize and manage your schedule. You can create, edit, and view upcoming events, set reminders and invite other people with our appointly appointment arrangement service.
AppMenu.app_email_desc: Email app enables users to send, receive, organize, and manage their electronic mail from multiple accounts in one place directly in our system, enabling seamless workflows.
AppMenu.app_all_tm_desc: Organize, track, and manage your tasks efficiently
AppMenu.app_all_subsidies_desc: Manage and track your subsidy applications
AppMenu.app_all_accounting_desc: Create invoices and manage your expenses and cash flow
AppMenu.app_all_workflows_desc: Manage and tailor all your workflows around your needs

Customers.title: Read what our customers have to say

ExploreMoreComponent.time_tracking_description: Accurately log work hours and streamline payroll processes with our Time Tracking app. Its intuitive interface allows easy time entry and reporting, making it more straightforward to analyze productivity and manage team workloads.
ExploreMoreComponent.task_management_description: Maximize your productivity with our Task Management app. Organize, prioritize, and monitor the progress of your daily tasks with a comprehensive dashboard that gives you a clear overview of your projects.
ExploreMoreComponent.email_description: Enhance your communication workflow with our Email app. Link your email seamlessly, ensuring meaningful conversations and attachments are easily accessible within your team's collaborative space.
ExploreMoreComponent.livechat_description: Communicate with team members instantly using our Live Chat app. Facilitate real-time conversations and enhance teamwork with a quick and effective communication platform.
ExploreMoreComponent.calendar_description: Stay organized and never miss an appointment with our Calendar app. Sync your schedule across all devices, get reminders for upcoming meetings, and plan your day with precision.
ExploreMoreComponent.human_resources_description: Revolutionize your HR operations with our comprehensive HR Management app. Streamline the hiring process, manage employee records, and track time off in one centralized platform.
ExploreMoreComponent.document_management_description: Keep your files organized, secure, and easily retrievable with our Document Management app. Centralize all your essential documents, control access permissions, and collaborate on files in real-time.
ExploreMoreComponent.sales_description: The Sales App optimizes your sales workflow with customizable processes, real-time analytics, and a centralized data repository, streamlining operations for maximum efficiency.

DefaultItems.title: What is Clusterix Suite?
DefaultItems.description: Clusterix Suite is an ecosystem of applications designed to optimize your business operations. It includes time tracking, document management, calendar, email integration, and more - all accessible via a unified dashboard.

DefaultItems.title: What are the different apps available in Clusterix Suite?
DefaultItems.description: Clusterix Suite offers a range of apps, including:
list: <ListTitle>Task Management:</ListTitle> Organize, prioritize, and track the progress of your daily tasks.
<ListTitle>Time Tracking:</ListTitle> Keep track of work hours with ease.
<ListTitle>Email Integration:</ListTitle> Streamline communication with seamless email connectivity.
<ListTitle>Calendar:</ListTitle> Organize and sync your schedule across devices.
<ListTitle>Document Management:</ListTitle> Centralize and manage your files securely.
<ListTitle>Live Chat:</ListTitle> Connect instantly with team members or customers for real-time communication.
<ListTitle>Sales:</ListTitle> Transform your sales strategy - where innovation meets execution to boost your team's productivity and success.

DefaultItems.title: How will I use all the apps together?
DefaultItems.description: Clusterix Suite is designed for simplicity and efficiency. With a single panel, you can access and manage all apps. They are fully integrated, allowing data to flow seamlessly from one to the other, simplifying your workflow and saving you time.

DefaultItems.title: What is the pricing model for Clusterix Suite?
DefaultItems.description: 100% FREE! As we develop, we will introduce tiered pricing, providing options to fit every business size and need. It’s an opportunity you won’t want to miss.

DefaultItems.title: Can people subscribe to individual apps within the Clusterix Suite?
DefaultItems.description: Absolutely. While the full suite offers a comprehensive experience, you are free to subscribe to individual apps that best suit your business needs.

DefaultItems.title: How do I get started with Clusterix?
DefaultItems.description: Getting started with Clusterix Suite is as simple as signing up on our website. Begin with what you need, and our intuitive setup will guide you through personalizing the suite for your business.

DefaultItems.title: How many users can an organization include in its Clusterix Suite subscription?
DefaultItems.description: Our platform is built to scale with your team. From small startups to large enterprises, we support a minimum of two users to as many as your organization needs.

DefaultItems.title: What kind of support can I expect?
DefaultItems.description: Our dedicated support team is here to assist you every step of the way. From live chat support to a comprehensive knowledge base and community forums, we’re here to ensure your success with Clusterix Suite.

ContactUs.desc: Reach out today to see how Clusterix can transform your business processes. We’re excited to help you achieve seamless efficiency!
